founder.bio: Former enterprise engineering leader turned AI implementation specialist for traditional businesses. I help family-run, blue-collar, and legacy industries leapfrog into the AI era with practical, impactful solutions.

timeline.event: Engineering Leader at Motorola Solutions, modernizing legacy CCTV solutions
Led team at Amazon, modernizing driver communications technology
Joined Disney, transforming streaming for live sports and events
Founded my consultancy, bringing AI expertise to overlooked industries

testimonials.quote: The AI systems we implemented together saved us 20 hours per week in manual work. Our technicians now focus on what they do best while the AI handles the routine tasks.
testimonials.author: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.quote: We tried expensive off-the-shelf software for years. Nothing worked until this custom AI approach that actually fits how our business operates and learns from our specific needs.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally, someone who understands both cutting-edge AI AND the realities of running a construction business. The perfect bridge we needed to modernize without disruption.
testimonials.author: David Rodriguez
